title: Pack-drive runtime roots and validation selection
summary: Remove remaining fixed pack-root assumptions from runtime helpers, CLI defaults, and validation selection.
scope_items: Resolve machine, docs, workflow, tracking, initiative, project, and overview roots from pack declarations
Make validation suite and target selection pack-aware
done_when_items: Shared runtime no longer requires plan-specific root assumptions for pack selection
Validation entrypoints resolve pack-specific suites and targets without WatchTowerPlan hardcoding
